name: LinkedIn: Search
summary: Search LinkedIn (people, posts, or companies) read-only by driving the real global typeahead and return flat result cards.
description: Open the LinkedIn feed, type the query into the global search typeahead, press Enter, switch to the requested vertical tab (People / Posts / Companies), scroll, and return a flat array of result cards. Read-only. Use for a quick read of who or what matches a query. Drives the real UI (homepage -> typeahead -> Enter) rather than a /search URL to avoid bot fingerprints.

query.description: Search text to type into the LinkedIn global search box.

vertical.description: Which results vertical to extract: people, content (Posts), or companies. Defaults to people.

max_results.description: Upper bound on extracted result cards. Defaults to 20, max 50.

steps.name: Open the LinkedIn feed in a fresh tab
Type the query into the typeahead
Press Enter to run the search
Allow the search results page to load

inputs.script: const cleanArg=(v)=>{const t=String(v==null?'':v).trim();return /^\{[a-zA-Z0-9_]+\}$/.test(t)?'':t;};const vertical=(cleanArg(arg0)||'people').toLowerCase();const want=vertical==='content'?'Posts':(vertical==='companies'?'Companies':'People');let clicked='';const nodes=Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('main button, main a, button, a'));for(const n of nodes){const t=(n.innerText||n.textContent||'').replace(/\s+/g,' ').trim();if(t===want){try{n.click();clicked=want;break;}catch(e){}}}return {vertical_clicked:clicked};

steps.name: Click the requested vertical tab (People / Posts / Companies)
Allow the vertical results to load
Dismiss popups if present after switching vertical
Scroll to load more result cards
Extract result cards for the selected vertical

help.summary: Search LinkedIn (people, posts, or companies) read-only by driving the real global typeahead.

parameters.query: Search text to type into the LinkedIn global search box.
parameters.vertical: Results vertical: people | content (Posts) | companies. Defaults to people.
parameters.max_results: Upper bound on extracted result cards. Defaults to 20, max 50.

examples.command: rzn-browser run linkedin search --param query="digital learning"
examples.description: Return up to 20 People results for the query.

examples.command: rzn-browser run linkedin search --param query="learning consultant" --param vertical="content" --param max_results=30
rzn-browser run linkedin search --param query="learning" --param vertical="companies"
examples.description: Return company results for the query.

returns: Array of flat cards. people: {name, headline, location, profile_url}. content: {author, text, post_url}. companies: {name, industry, company_url}.
notes: Read-only. Never connects, messages, follows, or posts.
Drives the real UI: feed -> global typeahead -> Enter -> vertical tab, not a /search URL.
post_url is empty for the content vertical (LinkedIn does not expose per-post permalinks as hrefs in feed cards).
Results are deduped by canonical href (query string stripped) and capped at max_results.
